Sipadan Island.current_note: Barracuda Point/South Point strong drift; AOW mandatory

Great Barrier Reef.current_note: Cod Hole gentle; strong drift only at Osprey/Coral Sea

Komodo National Park.current_note: Ripping tidal currents, reef hooks standard

Raja Ampat.current_note: Currents define diving; reef hooks at Blue Magic/Sardine

Cocos Island.current_note: Strong wet-season currents, advanced-only pelagic diving

Maldives.current_note: Tidal channel currents, manageable drift; strong at kandus

Seychelles.current_note: Granite sites mild-moderate; current at Shark Bank/Brissare

Palau.current_note: Blue Corner up to 3 knots; reef hooks essential

Truk (Chuuk) Lagoon.current_note: Sheltered lagoon, minimal current on wrecks

Red Sea (Egypt).current_note: Sheltered north; strong drift at Brothers/Daedalus/Elphinstone

Fernando de Noronha.current_note: Leeward mild; windward and Dec-Mar currents stronger

Bahamas.current_note: Gulf Stream drift at Bimini; Tiger Beach variable

Bonaire.current_note: Protected leeward shore diving, minimal current

Cayman Islands.current_note: Limited tidal range, gentle currents on walls

Cozumel.current_note: Yucatan Current defines drift diving here

Great Blue Hole.current_note: Minimal current; depth/darkness is the challenge

Whitsunday Islands.current_note: Large tidal range drives light-to-strong currents

Maui & Kona.current_note: Calm leeward coasts; current only at exposed sites

Chagos Archipelago / BIOT.current_note: Oceanic atoll channels and exposed walls

Ningaloo Reef.current_note: Lagoon gentle; tidal passes need slack-tide planning

Cenotes of Yucatán Peninsula.current_note: Calm still water, no current or waves

Azores.current_note: Princess Alice strong currents, experienced only

Lundy Island.current_note: Tidal Bristol Channel; seal coves sheltered

Scapa Flow.current_note: Sheltered Flow centre; blockship channels slack-only

Fiji.current_note: Current-driven drift dives feed the soft corals

French Polynesia.current_note: Tiputa/Fakarava pass currents can be mask-ripping

Guadalcanal & Western Province.current_note: Fairly easy diving, not much current

Poor Knights Islands.current_note: Arches/headlands can run strong; most sites moderate

Apo Island & Dumaguete.current_note: Apo points strong drift; Dauin muck calm

Bunaken National Marine Park.current_note: Wall drift, usually mild, occasionally strong

Gili Islands & Lombok.current_note: Lombok Strait drift common; training sites gentle

Malapascua Island.current_note: Shoal dawn dives gentle; current mainly at full moon

Similan Islands.current_note: Mostly mild-moderate; strong at Koh Tachai/Richelieu

Tubbataha Reefs Natural Park.current_note: Persistent currents; all dives drift with live boat

Lord Howe Island.current_note: Island sites sheltered; strong drift at Ball's Pyramid

South West Rocks.current_note: EAC variable; Fish Rock has sheltered gutters
